testcase.name: test_08_payment_exceeds_remaining_rejected

failure.message: AssertionError: Overpayment should be rejected: 200 assert 200 in [400, 422] + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loans_feature.py:230: in test_08_payment_exceeds_remaining_rejected assert response.status_code in [400, 422], f"Overpayment should be rejected: {response.status_code}" E AssertionError: Overpayment should be rejected: 200 E assert 200 in [400, 422] E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_09_auto_paid_off_status
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loans_feature.py:257: in test_09_auto_paid_off_status assert response.status_code == 200, f"Final payment failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Final payment failed: {"detail":"Lening is niet actief"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_11_whatsapp_notification_loan_created
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loans_feature.py:322: in test_11_whatsapp_notification_loan_created loan_created_msgs = [m for m in messages if m.get("message_type") == "loan_created"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_loans_feature.py:322: in <listcomp> loan_created_msgs = [m for m in messages if m.get("message_type") == "loan_created"] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'

testcase.name: test_12_whatsapp_notification_loan_payment
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_loans_feature.py:366: in test_12_whatsapp_notification_loan_payment loan_payment_msgs = [m for m in messages if m.get("message_type") == "loan_payment"] ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ backend/tests/test_loans_feature.py:366: in <listcomp> loan_payment_msgs = [m for m in messages if m.get("message_type") == "loan_payment"] ^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'str' object has no attribute 'get'
